My Capstone Documentation¶

Welcome to the documentation for the News Engine project.

Editorial Views¶

class news_engine.views.ArticleListCreate(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListCreateAPIView

filter_backends = [<class 'django_filters.rest_framework.backends.DjangoFilterBackend'>, <class 'rest_framework.filters.SearchFilter'>]¶
filterset_fields = ['category']¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Get the list of items for this view. This must be an iterable, and may be a queryset. Defaults to using self.queryset.

This method should always be used rather than accessing self.queryset directly, as self.queryset gets evaluated only once, and those results are cached for all subsequent requests.

You may want to override this if you need to provide different querysets depending on the incoming request.

(Eg. return a list of items that is specific to the user)

perform_create(serializer)[source]¶
permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticatedOrReadOnly'>]¶
search_fields = ['title', 'content']¶
serializer_class¶

alias of ArticleSerializer

class news_engine.views.ArticleListView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListView

context_object_name = 'articles'¶
get_queryset()[source]¶

Return the list of items for this view.

The return value must be an iterable and may be an instance of QuerySet in which case QuerySet specific behavior will be enabled.

model¶

alias of Article

paginate_by = 6¶
template_name = 'news_engine/article_list.html'¶

class news_engine.views.UserFeedAPIView(**kwargs)[source]¶

Bases: ListAPIView

get_queryset()[source]¶

Get the list of items for this view. This must be an iterable, and may be a queryset. Defaults to using self.queryset.

This method should always be used rather than accessing self.queryset directly, as self.queryset gets evaluated only once, and those results are cached for all subsequent requests.

You may want to override this if you need to provide different querysets depending on the incoming request.

(Eg. return a list of items that is specific to the user)

permission_classes = [<class 'rest_framework.permissions.IsAuthenticated'>]¶
serializer_class¶

alias of ArticleSerializer

news_engine.views.approve_article_html(request, article_id)[source]¶

This method will be used to approve an article, mark it as live, and post a notification to X (Twitter).

Parameters:

  • request (HttpRequest) – The object representing the current HTTP request

  • article_id (int) – The unique identifier of the article to be approved

Returns:

A redirect to the editor dashboard

Return type:

HttpResponseRedirect

news_engine.views.article_detail(request, pk)[source]¶
news_engine.views.editor_dashboard(request)[source]¶

This method will be used to retrieve and display all pending articles and newsletters that require editorial review.

Parameters:

request (HttpRequest) – The object representing the current HTTP request

Returns:

A rendered HTML page containing the editor’s dashboard

Return type:

HttpResponse

news_engine.views.home(request)[source]¶
news_engine.views.is_editor(user)[source]¶
news_engine.views.journalist_detail(request, pk)[source]¶
news_engine.views.register_html(request)[source]¶
news_engine.views.reject_article_html(request, article_id)[source]¶

This method will be used to permanently delete an article from the database when it is rejected by an editor.

Parameters:

  • request (HttpRequest) – The object representing the current HTTP request

  • article_id (int) – The unique identifier of the article to be rejected

Returns:

A redirect to the editor dashboard

Return type:

HttpResponseRedirect

news_engine.views.subscribe(request, target_type, target_id)[source]¶
news_engine.views.user_feed(request)[source]¶
